_doc: Curated REAL seed entities. A brief = (tool/category) × (compatible seed). The seed supplies the actual subject matter so outputs are comparable and realistic. Threaded from one concept (not madlibs). Expand freely — dynamism comes from many sources, not LLM-fabricated briefs.

repo.name: facebook/react
repo.blurb: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces with components and a virtual DOM.
repo.material: Top-level: packages/react (core), packages/react-dom (renderer), packages/scheduler (cooperative scheduling), packages/react-reconciler (fiber reconciler). Data flows: props down, events up; reconciler diffs the fiber tree and commits to react-dom.

repo.name: shinyobjectz/out-of-thin-air
repo.blurb: A polyglot code-as-X router: describe an artifact, it runs the right toolchain and shows it in one universal shell.
repo.material: cli/ (router + API + worktop), components/artifact (universal shell, 8 render kinds), wrappers/<cat>-<tool>.work, tools/steps/<cat>-<tool>.sh, skill/catalog. 29 categories. Chain: session.work → run.sh → out/.

repo.name: sqlite/sqlite
repo.blurb: A small, fast, self-contained, serverless SQL database engine.
repo.material: Layers: SQL compiler (tokenizer → parser → code generator) → VDBE bytecode engine → B-tree → pager → OS interface (VFS). The pager handles transactions + WAL; the B-tree stores tables/indexes as pages.

repo.name: terrastruct/d2
repo.blurb: A text-to-diagram scripting language that compiles .d2 source to SVG.
repo.material: Pipeline: d2compiler (parse DSL) → d2graph (shapes/edges/containers) → d2layout (dagre/ELK/TALA engine) → d2exporter → d2svg renderer. Go library + WASM build (d2js).

repo.name: vercel/satori
repo.blurb: Converts HTML + CSS (as JSX) into SVG, used for OG images.
repo.material: Input: a React-like element tree + a subset of CSS (flexbox). Yoga computes layout; satori walks the tree producing SVG shapes/text. No browser. Output: a single SVG string.

repo.name: tldraw/tldraw
repo.blurb: An infinite-canvas SDK for whiteboards and visual tools.
repo.material: Store (reactive records: shapes, pages, camera) → Editor (the API surface) → shape utils (per-shape geometry/render) → React canvas. Snapshots serialize to .tldr JSON.

dataset.name: Palmer Penguins
dataset.blurb: Body measurements of 344 penguins across 3 species and 3 islands.

dataset.name: Gapminder
dataset.blurb: Life expectancy, population and GDP per capita by country and year (1952–2007).

dataset.name: Iris
dataset.blurb: 150 iris flowers, 4 measurements, 3 species — the classic classification set.

dataset.blurb: Streaming counts + audio features for popular tracks.

brand.name: True Classic
brand.material: tagline: 'Look good. Feel confident.' palette: navy #1b2a41, white #fff, athletic fit. hero product: 3-pack crew tees. voice: direct, friendly, value-forward.

brand.name: Caraway
brand.blurb: Non-toxic ceramic-coated cookware in modern colorways.
brand.material: tagline: 'Cookware without the chemicals.' palette: cream #f3ece2, sage, terracotta. hero product: ceramic non-stick fry pan. voice: clean, calm, design-led.

brand.name: Tecovas
brand.material: tagline: 'The best boots at a fair price.' palette: tan #c8a165, dark brown, cream. hero product: The Cartwright cowboy boot. voice: rugged, honest, heritage.

brand.name: Liquid Death
brand.blurb: Canned mountain water with heavy-metal branding.
brand.material: tagline: 'Murder your thirst.' palette: black #000, white, blood red. hero product: tallboy can of still water. voice: irreverent, punk, comedic.

brand.name: OLIPOP
brand.blurb: Prebiotic soda with low sugar and a retro look.
brand.material: tagline: 'A new kind of soda.' palette: pastel cream/strawberry, retro serif. hero product: Vintage Cola. voice: nostalgic, wholesome, gut-health.

brand.name: Ridge
brand.material: tagline: 'Carry less. Live more.' palette: gunmetal #2b2b2b, titanium, black. hero product: aluminum cardholder wallet. voice: sleek, engineered, modern.

brand.name: Magic Spoon
brand.blurb: High-protein, low-sugar cereal with childhood flavors.
brand.material: tagline: 'Cereal reimagined.' palette: cosmic blue/pink, playful. hero product: Cocoa cereal. voice: fun, bold, nostalgic-but-better.

brand.name: Allbirds
brand.material: tagline: 'Made with nature.' palette: natural greys/greens, soft. hero product: Wool Runner. voice: calm, eco-minded, understated.

topic.name: The Water Cycle
topic.blurb: How water moves through evaporation, condensation, precipitation and collection.
topic.material: stages: evaporation (sun heats oceans) → condensation (clouds form) → precipitation (rain/snow) → collection (rivers/groundwater) → repeat. Key driver: solar energy + gravity.

topic.name: RAFT Consensus
topic.blurb: A consensus algorithm for replicated logs.
topic.material: roles: leader, follower, candidate. terms + elections; leader appends log entries, replicates to followers, commits on majority. Safety via election restriction + log matching.

topic.name: A Beginner's Guide to Sourdough
topic.blurb: Baking bread with a wild-yeast starter.
topic.material: steps: feed starter → autolyse flour+water → mix+salt → bulk ferment with stretch-and-folds → shape → cold proof → score → bake in a dutch oven. Key: hydration + fermentation time.

topic.name: The Bauhaus
topic.blurb: The German design school that fused art, craft and industry (1919–1933).
topic.material: principles: form follows function, geometric abstraction, primary colors, sans-serif type. figures: Gropius, Kandinsky, Albers. legacy: modern graphic + product design.

topic.name: Quantum Entanglement
topic.material: two particles share a state; measuring one instantly determines the other's correlated value. No faster-than-light signaling. Foundation for quantum computing + cryptography.

topic.name: The Rise of Remote Work
topic.material: drivers: broadband, cloud tools, 2020 catalyst. tradeoffs: flexibility + talent reach vs collaboration + culture. trends: hybrid models, async communication, results-over-hours.
